description: Inspect IONOS CLOUD infrastructure via MCP
name: io.github.ionos-cloud/ionoscloud-mcp

environmentVariables.description: IONOS CLOUD API token (required for all products except Object Storage)
environmentVariables.name: IONOS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: S3 access key for IONOS Object Storage
environmentVariables.name: IONOS_S3_ACCESS_KEY

environmentVariables.description: S3 secret key for IONOS Object Storage
environmentVariables.name: IONOS_S3_SECRET_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Tool registration strategy (the --load-mode flag overrides this). 'eager' (default): register all tools at startup. 'lazy': defer Compute and Object Storage behind 'ionos_load_compute_tools' / 'ionos_load_objectstorage_tools' sentinel tools (requires MCP client support for notifications/tools/list_changed). 'dynamic' (alias 'search'): expose only the ionos_search_tools / ionos_describe_tools / ionos_call_tool meta-tools and browse the full catalog through them — for clients with hard tool caps and no tool search of their own (Cursor, Windsurf).
environmentVariables.name: IONOS_MCP_LOAD_MODE

title: IONOS CLOUD MCP Server
